lines.speaker: Alaxxi
lines.text: Nilsal, iknami! Do you need help with anything?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you do around here?

lines.speaker: Alaxxi
lines.text: I spend a lot of my time researching new product formulas for the lab. Just over here we have a batch of something new that I've dubbed 'Earworm'.

lines.speaker: Alaxxi
lines.text: Indeed! Its effects produce musical auditory hallucinations! Soon, people will be able to listen to music while on the go. It'll sell like hotcakes!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I feel like there has to be a better solution to that, but good luck anyway!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks! I'd better be going now.

lines.speaker: Alaxxi
lines.text: Our main focus is the advancement of Herblore through scientific study.

lines.speaker: Alaxxi
lines.text: As for an end goal... that information is only for senior members.

lines.speaker: Alaxxi
lines.text: Perhaps in time, you will learn of it!
